name: SoFi Credit Card (Unlimited 2%)

welcome_offer.description: Welcome bonus varies by targeted offer. New applicants should check SoFi for current promotions. Note: Some existing cardholders are now being charged a monthly fee (not annual); new applicants are not charged a monthly fee.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 2% cash back (2 points per $1). Points worth 1 cent each when redeemed into SoFi checking, savings, investment, or toward qualifying loans/card.
3% back on travel booked through SoFi Travel

other_benefits.name: SoFi ecosystem integration
other_benefits.description: Redeem rewards into SoFi checking, savings, investment accounts, or toward SoFi personal/student loans, or SoFi credit card balance

other_benefits.name: SoFi Travel
other_benefits.description: 3% back on travel booked through SoFi Travel portal

notes: SoFi Unlimited 2% Credit Card is invitation-only or requires pre-qualification through SoFi account. Not available to general public. Best redemption value is 1 cent/point into SoFi ecosystem (checking, savings, investment, or loan paydown). Cannot redeem for cash directly — must be SoFi ecosystem. Some existing cardholders transitioned to a monthly fee model as of Jan 2026; new applicants are not charged monthly fee.
